input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.12.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.12.2
            TITLE: any non permanent joint at the end(s) must be a double lug joint or a sleeved butt joint

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.12.2: Any non permanent joint at the end(s) must be a Double Lug Joint or a Sleeved Butt Joint
F.5.12.2 Any non permanent joint at the end(s) must be a Double Lug Joint or a Sleeved Butt Joint
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 36 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023 
Figure – Double Lug Joint

final_answer: Any non permanent joint at the end(s) must be a Double Lug Joint or a Sleeved Butt Joint
